blended.narrative: Mt. Ashland is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,279 ft. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
